name: @harness/backup-dr
description: ISSUE-085 — Backup & DR (ADR-008 / NFR-DR.001-009). The per-silo backup & disaster-recovery posture: the hourly client-owned off-platform pg_dump job definition (default RPO ~1h) + free daily in-project floor (below-hourly = a LOGGED downgrade, never silent); the operator-run restore-REHEARSAL job (restore into a throwaway project, assert DB + pgvector memory + auth user rows come back complete & queryable, log result+timestamp, monthly + on every migration release) built ON the GREEN AF-069 (ISSUE-004 Path B); the FIVE backup-health fields assembled onto the mgmt-plane deployment_health.backup_health push with a loud lapse/stale alert (never silently assume-healthy, #3); and the off-platform backup-purge leg of compliance erasure (NFR-DR.009 receive-leg). Port + in-memory FAKE for offline tests + a live pg/CLI adapter (backup-dr-live.ts) authored to the real DDL/CLI — NOT executed offline. The live rehearsal run + AF-072 (LOAD) + AF-069 Path A (PITR) are operator-present residuals — implemented-to-AC, offline-proven, listed owed-to-live.
